source.label: Business Demography
note:
This data contains revisions for Business Demography 2020 and Business Demography 2019. Please see the [url=https://www.cso.ie/en/releasesandpublications/ep/p-bd/businessdemography2021/]Business Demography 2021[/url] release for more details.

From 2022 non-market producers are excluded from Business Demography. This methodology was applied to 2021 in a revision.
For more information, please go to the [url=https://www.cso.ie/en/statistics/enterprisestatistics/businessdemography/]statistical release page[/url] on our website.

benchmark_rows.sme_label: Construction, manufacturing, logistics, utilities, and support services
benchmark_rows.nace_mapping: B=Mining and Quarrying (B); C=Manufacturing (C); D=Electricity, Gas, Steam and Air Conditioning Supply (D); E=Water Supply; Sewerage, Waste Management and Remediation Activities (E); F=Construction (F); H=Transportation and Storage (H); N=Administrative and Support Service Activities (N)
benchmark_rows.source_note: CSO Business Demography BRA34 2023 active enterprises by county and NACE activity; mapped to SME Dual Engine starter GICS sectors.

benchmark_rows.sme_label: Non-staple retail, hospitality, leisure, and local services
benchmark_rows.nace_mapping: G=WholeSale and Retail Trade; Repair of Motor Vehicles and Motorcycles (G); I=Accommodation and Food Service Activities (I); R=Arts, Entertainment and Recreation (R); less G471=Retail Sale in Non-Specialised Stores (G471); less G472=Retail Sale of Food, Beverages and Tobacco in Specialised Stores (G472); less G473=Retail Sale of Automotive Fuel in Specialised Stores (G473)
benchmark_rows.source_note: CSO Business Demography BRA34 2023 active enterprises by county and NACE activity; mapped to SME Dual Engine starter GICS sectors.

benchmark_rows.sme_label: Food, fuel, and non-specialised essential retail
benchmark_rows.nace_mapping: G471=Retail Sale in Non-Specialised Stores (G471); G472=Retail Sale of Food, Beverages and Tobacco in Specialised Stores (G472); G473=Retail Sale of Automotive Fuel in Specialised Stores (G473)
benchmark_rows.source_note: CSO Business Demography BRA34 2023 active enterprises by county and NACE activity; mapped to SME Dual Engine starter GICS sectors.

benchmark_rows.nace_mapping: Q=Human Health and Social Work Activities (Q)
benchmark_rows.source_note: CSO Business Demography BRA34 2023 active enterprises by county and NACE activity; mapped to SME Dual Engine starter GICS sectors.
CSO Business Demography BRA34 2023 active enterprises by county and NACE activity; mapped to SME Dual Engine starter GICS sectors.

benchmark_rows.sme_label: Financial, insurance, and professional services enterprises
benchmark_rows.nace_mapping: K=Financial and Insurance Activities (K); M=Professional, Scientific and Technical Activities (M)
